name: Sensor ORM Class Definition
description: Tests ability to define a Mappable class with PrimaryKey, ColumnType, nargin guard, and custom methods
prompt: Create a MATLAB ORM class called Sensor that maps to a 'sensors' database table with columns: SensorID (int, primary key), Location (string), Type (string), CalibrationDate (datetime mapped to date column type). Include a method recalibrate() that sets CalibrationDate to today.

assertions.description: Class inherits from database.orm.mixin.Mappable
classdef has TableName = 'sensors' attribute
SensorID property block has PrimaryKey attribute
CalibrationDate property block has ColumnType = 'date' attribute
Constructor handles nargin == 0 case
recalibrate method sets CalibrationDate to datetime('today')
assertions.expected: method recalibrate that assigns datetime("today") to CalibrationDate

assertions.description: Class defined in its own .m file named Sensor.m
assertions.expected: File is named Sensor.m, one class per file

name: Complete SQLite ORM Workflow
description: Tests a full ORM workflow: connect, define class, write, filtered read, update, verify
prompt: Write a complete ORM workflow using SQLite: create a Product class, connect to a local SQLite database, write 3 products, read them back with a price filter under $20, update the quantity of the filtered products, and verify the update.

assertions.description: Uses sqlite() to create a local database connection
Product class inherits from Mappable with PrimaryKey
assertions.expected: Product < database.orm.mixin.Mappable with a PrimaryKey property

assertions.description: Uses ormwrite to insert product objects
Uses ormread with RowFilter to filter by price
Uses ormupdate to push modified objects back to database
Verifies update by re-reading from database
assertions.expected: Second ormread after ormupdate to confirm changes

assertions.description: Closes connection with close(conn)
Code runs without error via evaluate_matlab_code

name: Employee ORM Class with orm2sql
description: Tests defining an ORM class for an existing table and using orm2sql for schema verification
prompt: I have an existing database table 'employees' with columns EmployeeID (int), Name (text), Department (text), Salary (real). Write the ORM class and show me the SQL it would generate with orm2sql.

assertions.description: Class inherits from database.orm.mixin.Mappable
PrimaryKey defined on EmployeeID
Property names or ColumnName attributes match database columns
assertions.expected: Properties map to EmployeeID, Name, Department, Salary columns

assertions.description: Uses orm2sql to inspect generated SQL
assertions.expected: orm2sql(conn, "Employee") call to view CREATE TABLE statement

assertions.description: Constructor handles nargin == 0
